name: stripe-payments-plugin
description: Stripe payments plugin for Tickets Platform — reference implementation

scripts.build: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:backend
scripts.build:frontend: bun build src/frontend.tsx --outfile dist/frontend.js --format esm --external react --external react-dom
scripts.build:backend: bun build src/backend.ts --outfile dist/backend.js --format esm --target node --external ticketsplatform-plugin-sdk
scripts.package: bun run build && cd dist && zip -r ../stripe-payments.zip . && cd .. && zip stripe-payments.zip plugin.json
